title: The Ghost Town of Bodie

scenes.text: Once a thriving gold mining town, Bodie is now an eerie ghost town.
Bodie is located in California, USA, and was founded during the gold rush.
The town was deserted in the 1940s but remains preserved as a state park.
Visitors report strange sounds and sightings, adding to its ghostly reputation.
scenes.label: MYSTERIOUS SIGHTINGS

scenes.text: Follow if the unknown keeps you up at night.

description: 📍 Bodie, USA - 1940s. Once a booming gold mining town, Bodie is now an abandoned ghost town with eerie sightings and sounds reported by visitors. Follow for daily mysteries!
